title: Data Storage Converter - Convert Digital Storage Units
description: Free data storage converter. Convert between bits, bytes, KB, MB, GB, TB, PB and their binary equivalents.
keywords: data storage converter, byte converter, MB to GB, storage unit calculator, digital storage
intro: Convert between digital storage units including bits, bytes, kilobytes, megabytes, gigabytes, terabytes, and petabytes.

faq.q: What is the difference between KB and KiB?
faq.a: KB (kilobyte) = 1000 bytes (decimal), while KiB (kibibyte) = 1024 bytes (binary). This converter uses the decimal (SI) standard where 1 KB = 1000 bytes.

faq.q: How many GB in a TB?
faq.a: 1 terabyte (TB) = 1000 gigabytes (GB) in decimal, or 1024 GB in binary.
